title: Client Side Validation Is a Suggestion

sections.content: Anything running on a user's device can be modified. Client validation prevents mistakes, not attacks. Attackers bypass form restrictions, disabled buttons, input checks, and rate limits by calling APIs directly.
All enforcement must exist on the server: authorization, business rules, data validation, and rate limiting. Client checks are for UX only.
If breaking your rules only requires opening DevTools, your system has no real protection. Never trust the client.
